title: Senior Financial Analyst - Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions!
